content.query:
-- View for CommercialWarranty Report v20220707
-- v20220801 Updated for Schema Change to System ID in Schema
--
-- DROP VIEW [dbo].[SCA_WarrantyReport]
--

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SCA_WarrantyReport]
	
	AS 

SELECT TransactionDate GLDate, '' RMADate, '' RMANum, SubModCustomer Customer, '' StockCode, 
       '' Supplier, '' Serial, '' [Initial Serial Number], EntryValue Price, 0 CostValue,
	  '' ProblemDesc, '' ProblemDetails, SubModArInvoice Invoice
FROM SCA.GenTransaction 
WHERE GlCode LIKE '4950%' AND TransactionDate >= datefromparts(2021,1,1) AND SubModArInvoice NOT IN 
	(SELECT SCA.ArTrnDetail.Invoice FROM SCA.ArTrnDetail LEFT JOIN SCA.RmaDetail ON substring(CustomerPoNumber,5,8) = RmaNumber  
    WHERE InvoiceDate >= datefromparts(2021,1,1) AND SCA.RmaDetail.RmaNumber IS NOT NULL)

UNION ALL

SELECT InvoiceDate GLDate, IssueDate RMADate, substring(CustomerPoNumber,5,8) RMANum, Customer, SCA.ArTrnDetail.StockCode, 
       Supplier, SCA.RmaDetailSer.Serial, SCA.RmaDetailPlus.InitialSerialNumbe [Initial Serial Number], Price, CostValue, 
	  ProblemDesc, ProblemDetails, SCA.ArTrnDetail.Invoice
FROM SCA.ArTrnDetail LEFT JOIN 
     SCA.RmaDetail ON substring(CustomerPoNumber,5,8) = RmaNumber AND SCA.ArTrnDetail.StockCode=SCA.RmaDetail.StockCode LEFT JOIN
     SCA.RmaDetailSer ON SCA.RmaDetailSer.RmaNumber = SCA.RmaDetail.RmaNumber AND SCA.RmaDetailSer.RmaLineNumber = SCA.RmaDetail.RmaLineNumber LEFT JOIN
     SCA.RmaDetailPlus ON SCA.RmaDetailPlus.RmaNumber = SCA.RmaDetail.RmaNumber AND SCA.RmaDetailPlus.RmaLineNumber = SCA.RmaDetail.RmaLineNumber LEFT JOIN
     SCA.RmaProblemCodes ON SCA.RmaProblemCodes.ProblemCode = SCA.RmaDetail.ProblemCode LEFT JOIN
	SCA.InvMaster ON SCA.ArTrnDetail.StockCode = SCA.InvMaster.StockCode 
WHERE InvoiceDate >= datefromparts(2021,1,1) AND SCA.ArTrnDetail.LineType = 1 AND SCA.RmaDetail.RmaNumber IS NOT NULL
